sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n40446" key="e)piparousi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐπιπαρουσία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n40446.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">presence</tr_> of a planet in a <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τόπος</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">Cat.Cod.Astr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5(3).88.5</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Al.</author> </bibl> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">O..</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2053.tlg001:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
